description: This pipeline splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. It takes an image as input, then splits it into separate channels.

a4c3f0bf-432f-4756-a3fe-a8bd59413317.name: annotate-filter-by-annotation
a4c3f0bf-432f-4756-a3fe-a8bd59413317.description: Filters data based on the annotation value.

15c7badc-68f6-4700-b859-64d6d4f39f07.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
15c7badc-68f6-4700-b859-64d6d4f39f07.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.

0681cf12-58ca-4155-bb77-e17addce1bb9.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
0681cf12-58ca-4155-bb77-e17addce1bb9.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.

824ac6f2-f1d7-4fd2-8696-f6bbd923d903.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
824ac6f2-f1d7-4fd2-8696-f6bbd923d903.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.

d1dee139-0a70-4031-acee-170317ce1fa3.name: io-interface
d1dee139-0a70-4031-acee-170317ce1fa3.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.

5e73ecfc-ce0e-4e10-8fed-16e00d6858fe.name: ij1-dimensions-expression-slicer
5e73ecfc-ce0e-4e10-8fed-16e00d6858fe.description: Uses expressions to create custom stacks. There are three expressions, one for each Z, channel and frame plane that return numeric indices of slices that should be generated. You can optionally enable to iterate over all incoming slices of the image to generate multiple stacks. If no iteration is enabled (default), each expression is only executed for z=0,c=0,t=0.

7e2d243b-3273-4d89-9de3-219bdc539d0e.name: ij1-dimensions-expression-slicer
7e2d243b-3273-4d89-9de3-219bdc539d0e.description: Uses expressions to create custom stacks. There are three expressions, one for each Z, channel and frame plane that return numeric indices of slices that should be generated. You can optionally enable to iterate over all incoming slices of the image to generate multiple stacks. If no iteration is enabled (default), each expression is only executed for z=0,c=0,t=0.

1cd4857a-fa8d-4361-be1a-435d5c317859.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.
